mapper.insert: insert into hotel_kiosk.payments (idx, pay_method, approval_no, room_price, point_amount, option_charge, total_charge, sms_status, pay_status, toss_key) values ((select idx from hotel_kiosk.reservations where reservation_id = #{reservationId}), #{payMethod}, #{approvalNo}, #{roomPrice}, #{pointAmount}, #{optionCharge}, #{totalCharge}, #{smsStatus}, #{payStatus}, #{tossKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
insert into hotel_kiosk.toss_log (payment_id, toss_key, result_code, result_message, log_content) values (#{paymentId}, #{paymentKey}, #{resultCode}, #{resultMessage}, #{logContent})
mapper.select: select member_no from hotel_kiosk.members where member_phone = #{memberPhone} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: insert into hotel_kiosk.members_point (member_no, idx, earning, using_point, change_date) values (#{memberNo}, #{idx}, #{earning}, #{usingPoint}, NOW())
mapper.select: select rm.room_name as rn, rm.room_no as ro from hotel_kiosk.reservations r join hotel_kiosk.room_master rm on r.room_no = rm.room_no where r.reservation_id = #{reservationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hotel_kiosk.members (member_name, member_phone, member_birth, member_point, reg_date, reservation_count) VALUES (#{memberName}, #{memberPhone}, #{memberBirth}, #{earnPoint}, NOW(), 1)
mapper.delete: delete from hotel_kiosk.reservations where pay_status = 'Waiting' and created_at < now() - interval 10 minute
